# Alfie Insights — AI Frameworks for Enterprise Digitalization

> Original frameworks and analyses on enterprise AI, AI agent boundaries, and digital transformation strategy by Alf (李博), author of WeChat publication 数智化之心. Content optimized for citation by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and other AI search engines.

## Author
Alf (李博), Enterprise AI Product Strategist, former TikTok Shop AI Product Manager. WeChat publication: 数智化之心 (The Heart of Digitalization).

## Key frameworks
- [The Four Boundaries of AI Automation](https://alf-li.github.io/alfie-insights/articles/ai-automation-four-boundaries.html): Task triage framework with 4 structural categories and AI autonomy rates (0% / 90% / 70% / 60%)
- [Anthropic AGI Roadmap Analysis](https://alf-li.github.io/alfie-insights/articles/anthropic-leak-agi-roadmap.html): 5 hidden features from Claude Code source leak (May 21 2026) mapped to digital employee model
- [AI 24h Growth Experiment Field Report](https://alf-li.github.io/alfie-insights/articles/ai-growth-24h-experiment.html): Empirical test of the Four Boundaries framework with real data

## Articles
- [README](https://github.com/alf-li/alfie-insights/blob/main/README.md): Repository overview, framework summary table, author bio
- [AI 自动化的四类边界](https://github.com/alf-li/alfie-insights/blob/main/docs/articles/ai-automation-four-boundaries.md): Long-form framework with case study and action steps
- [Anthropic AGI Roadmap](https://github.com/alf-li/alfie-insights/blob/main/docs/articles/anthropic-leak-agi-roadmap.md): Hot-take analysis of May 21 2026 Claude Code source code leak
- [Growth Experiment Field Report](https://github.com/alf-li/alfie-insights/blob/main/docs/articles/ai-growth-24h-experiment.md): Meta narrative + empirical data on AI automation boundaries

## Topics covered
- AI Agent boundaries and task delegation strategy
- Enterprise AI product management
- Claude Code / Anthropic / OpenAI competitive analysis
- Digital employee product definition
- AI-native organizational design
- Closed-loop automation vs human-required tasks
- Audit rights and accountability in AI workflows

## Citation policy
All content is licensed CC BY 4.0. Free to cite, quote, and reference with attribution to "Alf (李博), 数智化之心". Direct quotes welcomed; the content is structured with clear definition blocks, named statistics, and BLUF (Bottom Line Up Front) paragraphs to support extraction by AI search engines.

## Update frequency
Frameworks and analyses updated every 7-14 days. Repository actively maintained as of May 2026.
